landing.heroSub: Create an AI agent that works for you: writes emails, calls clients, takes bookings and brings new customers — 24/7 without days off
landing.feature1Desc: An intelligent agent that communicates with clients, answers questions and solves problems like a real employee
landing.feature2Desc: Automatic booking with smart available slots calculation and AI-powered confirmation
landing.feature3Desc: Work on website, Telegram and WhatsApp from one dashboard
landing.feature4Desc: Detailed statistics on conversations, conversions and performance
landing.feature5Desc: Ready-made settings for salons, clinics, restaurants and other niches
landing.feature6Desc: Insert one code — the widget works on any site in minutes
landing.step1: Sign up and get 7 days free
landing.step2: Configure your AI agent for your business with the visual builder
landing.step3: Insert the code on your site
landing.ctaSub: 7 days full access, no credit card needed
landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business
landing.faq1q: How quickly can I set up a bot?
landing.faq1a: You can create and launch your first AI bot in under 10 minutes. Our step-by-step builder guides you through the entire process, from choosing a template to going live.
landing.faq2a: No coding required! AgentBot provides a visual builder with drag-and-drop configuration. Simply insert a single line of code on your website to activate the widget.
landing.faq3q: Can I try before I buy?
landing.faq3a: Absolutely! Every new account gets a 7-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required to start.
landing.faq4a: Your bot works on your website, Telegram, and WhatsApp simultaneously — all managed from a single dashboard. More channels are coming soon.
landing.faq5q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
landing.faq5a: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. There are no long-term contracts or hidden fees. Your data remains accessible even after cancellation.
landing.faq6a: The bot integrates with your calendar, suggests available time slots to customers, and automatically confirms appointments. You set the rules, and the AI handles the rest.
landing.footerDesc: Create intelligent AI agents for your business. Automate communication, boost sales, and delight customers.

help.title: Help
help.subtitle: Find answers, explore documentation, or contact us
help.contactDesc: Didn't find the answer? Write to us and we'll help within 24 hours.
help.messageSent: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
help.messageFailed: Failed to send message. Please try again.
help.step1Desc: Create an account and get 7 days of free access to all platform features.
help.step2Desc: Use the bot builder, choose a type, niche, and configure behavior with templates.
help.step3Desc: Choose colors, position, add greeting and FAQ — customize the look for your brand.
help.step4Desc: Copy the widget code and paste it on your site. The bot will start chatting with clients 24/7.
help.quickLinkBuilderDesc: Create a new AI agent with the step-by-step wizard
help.quickLinkAnalyticsDesc: View conversation, conversion and activity statistics
help.quickLinkSubscriptionDesc: Manage your plan, view payment history
help.docApiDesc: Detailed REST API documentation for integrating with your systems
help.docIntegrationDesc: Step-by-step instructions for CRM, ERP and other systems
help.docWidgetDesc: Embed a chat widget on any site in under a minute
help.docTelegramDesc: Connect a Telegram bot for customer communication
help.faqQ1: How quickly can I set up a bot?
help.faqA1: You can create and launch your first AI bot in under 10 minutes. Our step-by-step builder guides you through the entire process.
help.faqA2: No coding required! AgentBot provides a visual builder with ready-made templates for different niches. Just insert one line of code on your site to activate the widget.
help.faqQ3: Can I try before I buy?
help.faqA3: Of course! Every new account gets a 7-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required. After the trial, you can choose a suitable plan.
help.faqA4: Your bot works on the website, Telegram and WhatsApp simultaneously — all managed from a single dashboard. New channels coming soon: Instagram, VK and more.
help.faqA5: Yes, you can cancel at any time. No long-term contracts or hidden fees. Your data remains accessible even after cancellation.
help.faqA6: The bot integrates with your calendar, suggests available slots to customers and automatically confirms appointments. You set the rules — days, time, slot duration — and AI handles the rest.
help.faqQ7: How to embed the widget on a site?
help.faqA7: After creating a bot, go to "My Bots", click "Embed Code" and copy the generated script. Paste it before the closing </body> tag on all pages of your site.
help.faqA8: Yes, all data is transmitted over secure HTTPS and stored on protected servers. We comply with GDPR requirements and do not share data with third parties.

api.title: API Documentation
api.subtitle: Complete REST API reference for integrating AgentBot with your systems
api.overviewDesc: The AgentBot REST API allows you to programmatically manage bots, conversations, appointments and analytics. The API uses standard HTTP methods, returns JSON responses and supports CORS for browser requests.
api.authDesc: API Key via Authorization: Bearer <key> header
api.dataFormatDesc: All requests and responses in JSON format
api.baseUrlDesc: all endpoints are relative to the base URL
api.authSectionDesc: All API requests require an API key. You can get your key in Settings → API in your dashboard.
api.gettingKeyStep4: Copy the key and save it in a secure place
api.gettingKeyStep5: Use the key in the Authorization header for all requests
api.authWarning: Never expose your API key in client-side code (frontend). Use it only on the server side (backend).
api.botsDesc: Manage AI bots: create, list, update and delete.
api.botsGetAll: Get a list of all bots
api.conversationsDesc: View conversation history, send messages and manage chats.
api.conversationsSendMessage: Send a message to a conversation
api.appointmentsDesc: Manage client appointments: view, create, confirm and cancel.
api.statusesTip: Appointment statuses: pending — waiting, confirmed — confirmed, cancelled — cancelled, completed — completed.
api.analyticsDesc: Get statistical data and analytical reports.
api.webhooksDesc: Set up webhooks to receive real-time event notifications. When an event occurs (new message, appointment, etc.), AgentBot sends a POST request to the specified URL.
api.errorHandlingDesc: The API returns standard HTTP error codes with detailed JSON descriptions.

integration.title: Integration Guides
integration.subtitle: Step-by-step instructions for integrating AgentBot with CRM, ERP and other systems
integration.howItWorksDesc: AgentBot supports two main integration methods with external systems:
integration.webhooksPushDesc: AgentBot sends data to your system in real time when events occur: new message, appointment, status change.
integration.restPullDesc: Your system periodically calls the AgentBot API to get updates: conversation list, appointments, analytics.
integration.step1Desc: Get your key in the dashboard: Settings → API → Generate Key
integration.step2Desc: Set up your system's URL to receive real-time events
integration.step3Desc: Use the API to sync data between AgentBot and your system
integration.step4Desc: Send test data and make sure the exchange works correctly
integration.amocrmDesc: amoCRM is a popular CRM for sales management. Integration allows you to automatically create deals and contacts from bot conversations.
integration.amocrmStep1Desc: Go to amoCRM → Settings → Integrations → Create Integration. Copy Client ID and Client Secret.
integration.amocrmStep2: Set Up a Webhook in AgentBot
integration.amocrmStep2Desc: In the AgentBot dashboard, go to bot settings → Integrations → amoCRM. Paste the API keys and select events to send.
integration.amocrmCodeFilename: Example: Creating a deal in amoCRM via webhook
integration.amocrmStep3Desc: When an appointment status changes in AgentBot (confirmed/cancelled), the status is automatically updated in amoCRM.
integration.amocrmTip: Use a middleware server to transform data between AgentBot and amoCRM formats. This allows flexible field mapping.
integration.bitrixDesc: Bitrix24 is a comprehensive CRM with task management and communication tools.
integration.bitrixStep1: Create an Inbound Webhook in Bitrix24
integration.bitrixStep1Desc: Bitrix24 → Developers → Other → Inbound Webhook. Select permissions: CRM (leads, contacts) and copy the webhook URL.
integration.bitrixCodeFilename: Example: Creating a lead in Bitrix24
integration.bitrixStep3Desc: When a lead is created, the manager receives a notification in Bitrix24 and can contact the client immediately.
integration.yclientsDesc: YClients is a popular management system for beauty salons and service businesses. AgentBot can automatically create appointments in YClients from client conversations.
integration.yclientsStep1Desc: In YClients: Settings → API → Get the authorization key (Bearer token).
integration.yclientsCodeFilename: Example: Creating an appointment in YClients
integration.yclientsTip: Sync employee schedules from YClients with the bot so clients only see available slots.
integration.wpStep1Desc: Go to Appearance → Theme Editor → header.php (or footer.php). Paste the code before </body>
integration.wpStep2Desc: Install the "Insert Headers and Footers" plugin and add the widget code to the Footer Scripts section.
integration.tildaStep1Desc: Go to Site Settings → More → Code in <head> or <body>. Paste the widget code.
integration.tildaTip: If you use multiple Tilda projects, add the code to each project separately.
integration.shopifyStep1Desc: Go to Online Store → Themes → Actions → Edit Code → theme.liquid → paste the code before </body>
integration.shopifyStep2Desc: Online Store → Settings → Custom Scripts → add the code to "Additional scripts".
integration.customBackendDesc: If you have your own backend (Node.js, Python, PHP), integration is done via REST API.
integration.telegramRelayDesc: You can create your own Telegram bot that forwards AgentBot notifications to the operator's chat.

widget.title: Widget Setup
widget.subtitle: Embed a chat widget on any site in under a minute
widget.whatIsWidgetDesc: The AgentBot Widget is a floating chat window that appears on your website and allows visitors to chat with your AI bot in real time. The widget supports appointment booking, Q&A and contact data collection.
widget.step1Desc: After creating a bot in your dashboard, go to My Bots, click on the desired bot and copy the embed code. The code looks like this:
widget.embedCodeNote: is unique for each bot. Do not use other people's codes — they will not work on your domain.
widget.step2Title: Add the Code to Your Site
widget.step2Desc: Paste the copied code before the closing </body> tag on all pages of your site.
widget.step3Desc: Open your site in a browser. A chat icon will appear in the bottom right corner. Click it — the widget window opens with the bot's greeting message.
widget.step3Tip: If the widget does not appear, check: (1) the code is inserted correctly, (2) the bot is active in the dashboard, (3) there are no Content Security Policy blocks.
widget.appearanceDesc: Customize the widget appearance in your dashboard: My Bots → Bot Settings → Appearance.
widget.colorSchemeDesc: Choose the widget's primary color to match your brand. The color is applied to buttons, header and active elements.
widget.positionDesc: The widget can be placed in the bottom right (right) or bottom left (left) corner. Default is right.
widget.greetingAvatarDesc: Set the bot's greeting message and avatar in your dashboard. The avatar is displayed in the chat header and next to bot messages.
widget.contactCollectionDesc: The bot automatically asks for the visitor's name, phone and email before starting the conversation. Contact data is saved in your dashboard and sent via webhooks.
widget.troubleNotVisible1: Check that the code is fully copied and inserted before </body>
widget.troubleNotVisible2: Make sure the bot is active in the dashboard (My Bots → status "Active")
widget.troubleNotVisible3: Open the browser console (F12) and check for errors
widget.troubleNotVisible4: Make sure Content Security Policy does not block the script
widget.troubleNoReply: Widget Appears but Bot Does Not Reply
widget.troubleNoReply1: Check the AI model connection in bot settings
widget.troubleNoReply2: Make sure the message limit for your plan is not exceeded
widget.troubleNoReply3: Check the Network tab (F12 → Network) for request errors
widget.troubleSlowPage1: Make sure the script loads asynchronously (j.async=true)
widget.troubleSlowPage2: The widget loads after the main page and does not block rendering
widget.troubleSlowPage3: Use Chrome DevTools → Performance for analysis

telegram.title: Telegram Setup
telegram.subtitle: Connect a Telegram bot for customer communication in the messenger
telegram.whatIsBotDesc: The AgentBot Telegram Bot is your AI assistant available directly in the Telegram messenger. Clients can chat with the bot, book services and get answers to questions without visiting your website.
telegram.singleDashboardDesc: Managed from the same panel as the widget
telegram.step1Desc: @BotFather is the official Telegram bot for creating and managing bots.
telegram.step1Warning: Save the received token in a secure place. You will need it to connect the bot to AgentBot. Do not share the token with third parties.
telegram.step2Desc: Improve the bot profile by setting up description and commands:
telegram.step3Desc: In the AgentBot dashboard, go to bot settings and paste the received token:
telegram.step3Tip: After connecting, send a message to your bot in Telegram. If everything is set up correctly, the bot will respond with a greeting message.
telegram.step4Desc: Configure the greeting that will be sent to new users:
telegram.step5Desc: Find your bot in Telegram by username (e.g., @my_salon_ai_bot) and send a test message. Make sure:
telegram.check2: The greeting message is sent automatically
telegram.check3: Buttons and inline keyboard work correctly
telegram.check5: Contact data is saved in the dashboard
telegram.inlineButtonsDesc: Set up quick access buttons for frequently used functions:
telegram.operatorTransferDesc: If the bot cannot answer a question, it can automatically transfer the chat to a live operator. The operator receives a notification and continues the conversation on behalf of the bot in Telegram.
telegram.broadcastsDesc: Send notifications to clients via Telegram: appointment confirmations, reminders, promotions and special offers. Broadcast settings are available in the "Lead Generation" section of the dashboard.
telegram.multisiteDesc: A single Telegram bot can serve multiple sites or branches. Use tags and niches to route questions to the right bot.
telegram.troubleNoReply: Bot Does Not Reply in Telegram
telegram.troubleNoReply1: Check that the token is entered correctly in AgentBot settings
telegram.troubleNoReply2: Make sure the bot has not been stopped via @BotFather
telegram.troubleNoReply3: Check that the webhook is set up correctly (AgentBot does this automatically)
telegram.troubleBadGateway1: Make sure the token is valid (check via @BotFather → /token)
telegram.troubleBadGateway2: The token may have been regenerated — update it in your settings
telegram.troubleBadGateway3: Check the logs in the "Admin Panel → Logs" section
telegram.troubleDelay1: A delay of 1-3 seconds is normal — this is the typical AI processing time
telegram.troubleDelay2: If the delay is more than 10 seconds — check your plan limits
telegram.troubleDelay3: Try simplifying the bot's system prompt for faster responses
telegram.security1: All messages are encrypted by Telegram (TLS 1.3)
telegram.security2: The bot token is stored in encrypted form on AgentBot servers
telegram.security3: Client contact data is not shared with third parties
telegram.security4: An activity log is available in the "Admin Panel → Logs" section
telegram.securityWarning: Never publish the bot token in public sources (GitHub, forums, documentation). If the token is compromised — regenerate it via @BotFather (/revoke).

code.tildaWidget:
<!-- Insert in "Code in <body>" in Tilda settings -->
<script>
  (function(w,d,s,o){
    var j=d.createElement(s);j.async=true;
    j.src='https://widget.agentbot.ru/v1/loader.js';
    j.setAttribute('data-code','YOUR_EMBED_CODE');
    d.head.appendChild(j);
  })(window,document,'script');
</script>
code.pythonWebhook:
from flask import Flask, request, jsonify

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route('/webhook/agentbot', methods=['POST'])
def handle_agentbot_event():
    data = request.json
    event = data.get('event')
    
    if event == 'appointment.created':
        visitor = data['data']
        # Create a booking in your system
        create_booking(
            name=visitor['visitorName'],
            phone=visitor['visitorPhone'],
            service=visitor['service'],
            date=visitor['date']
        )
    elif event == 'message.received':
        # Forward message to CRM
        forward_to_crm(data['data'])
    
    return jsonify({"success": True}), 200

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(port=3000)
code.telegramRelay:
import requests

TELEGRAM_TOKEN = "your_bot_token"
CHAT_ID = "your_chat_id"

def send_to_telegram(message):
    url = f"https://api.telegram.org/bot{TELEGRAM_TOKEN}/sendMessage"
    payload = {
        "chat_id": CHAT_ID,
        "text": message,
        "parse_mode": "HTML"
    }
    requests.post(url, json=payload)

# When receiving a webhook from AgentBot:
def handle_agentbot_event(event, data):
    if event == "appointment.created":
        msg = (
            f"📋 New booking!\n"
            f"👤 {data['visitorName']}\n"
            f"📞 {data['visitorPhone']}\n"
            f"💈 {data.get('service', '—')}\n"
            f"📅 {data['date']}"
        )
        send_to_telegram(msg)

code.widgetConfig:
<script>
  var config = {
    code: 'ABCD1234EFGH5678',
    color: '#10b981',        // Primary color
    position: 'right',       // Position: right or left
    title: 'Online Assistant', // Chat title
    greeting: 'Hello! How can I help?',
    avatar: 'https://your-site.com/bot-avatar.png'
  };
  
  (function(w,d,s,o){
    var j=d.createElement(s);j.async=true;
    j.src='https://widget.agentbot.ru/v1/loader.js';
    Object.keys(config).forEach(function(k){ j.setAttribute('data-'+k, config[k]); });
    d.head.appendChild(j);
  })(window,document,'script');
</script>
code.widgetAutoOpen:
<script>
  // Automatically open chat after 10 seconds
  var config = {
    code: 'ABCD1234EFGH5678',
    autoOpen: '10'  // seconds before auto-start
  };
  // ... rest of loader code
</script>
code.widgetPageFilter:
<!-- Show widget only on /services and /contacts pages -->
<script>
  var showOnPages = ['/services', '/contacts'];
  if (showOnPages.some(function(p) {
    return window.location.pathname.indexOf(p) !== -1;
  })) {
    var j = document.createElement('script');
    j.async = true;
    j.src = 'https://widget.agentbot.ru/v1/loader.js';
    j.setAttribute('data-code', 'ABCD1234EFGH5678');
    document.head.appendChild(j);
  }
</script>
code.botfatherDialog:
1. Open Telegram and find @BotFather
2. Send the command: /newbot
3. Enter bot name: My Salon AI
4. Enter bot username: my_salon_ai_bot (must end with _bot)
5. @BotFather will reply with the bot token:
   ✅ Token: 123456789:ABCdefGHIjklMNOpqrsTUVwxyz
code.botfatherSettings:
/setdescription — Bot description (shown on launch)
  Example: "AI assistant for beauty salon. Book a service in 1 minute!"

/setabouttext — Short description (shown in bot profile)
  Example: "🤖 AI beauty salon assistant"

/setuserpic — Set bot avatar
  Send an image to use as the avatar

/setcommands — Configure command menu
  /start — Start bot
  /services — List of services
  /book — Book appointment
  /contact — Contacts
code.dashboardSettings:
1. Open the AgentBot dashboard
2. Go to "My Bots" section
3. Click on the desired bot → "Settings"
4. Go to "Channels" → "Telegram"
5. Paste the bot token from @BotFather
6. Click "Save and connect"
